title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
